disclaimer: AI-curated initial list. Each provider's policy may have changed since 'last_verified' — the signup_url is authoritative. krouter shows this data to help users discover free credits to apply for; routing automatically prefers providers whose API key the user has actually configured in any agent. Operators should re-verify entries on each commit to data/free_tokens.json.

providers.free_summary: New accounts get ¥10 credit (~5M tokens DeepSeek-V3 / 600k DeepSeek-R1)
providers.conditions: Phone number + real-name verification (Chinese mobile registers directly)
providers.key_setup_hint: Put the sk- key into your agent's deepseek provider config (e.g. OpenClaw)
providers.notes: One of the cheapest, longest-context Chinese vendors

zh.free_summary: 新用户注册赠送 ¥10 余额 (约可用 5M tokens DeepSeek-V3 / 600k DeepSeek-R1)
zh.conditions: 手机号 + 实名认证 (国内手机可直接注册)
zh.key_setup_hint: 在 OpenClaw 等 agent 的 deepseek provider 配置里填入 sk- 开头的 key
zh.notes: 国内 vendor 中价格最低 / 上下文最长之一

providers.key_setup_hint: Configure the API key for the zai (a.k.a. zhipu / glm) provider in your agent
providers.notes: GLM-4-Flash is fully free (no token cap, rate-limited)

zh.free_summary: 注册赠送 2500万 tokens 额度 (GLM-4-Plus / GLM-4-Flash)
zh.key_setup_hint: 在 agent 里配置 zai (或 zhipu / glm) provider 的 API key
zh.notes: GLM-4-Flash 模型完全免费 (无 token 上限,有 rate limit)

additional_protocols.key_setup_hint: Zhipu also exposes an Anthropic-compatible endpoint (for Claude Code etc.). Add a second anthropic provider in your agent named zai-anthropic, baseURL https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/anthropic, same key — so Anthropic-protocol clients like Claude Code also get free routing. Verify the endpoint URL on the official site.

zh.key_setup_hint: 智谱也提供 Anthropic 兼容 endpoint (用于 Claude Code 等)。在 agent 里再加一个 anthropic provider,命名为 zai-anthropic, baseURL 填 https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/anthropic, 同一个 key — 让 Claude Code 等 Anthropic 协议客户端也享有免费 routing。请去官网核对 endpoint URL 是否变更。

providers.free_summary: New users get ¥15 trial credit (~1M tokens moonshot-v1-8k)
providers.key_setup_hint: API key for your agent's moonshot provider

zh.free_summary: 新用户赠送 ¥15 体验额度 (约 100万 tokens moonshot-v1-8k)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 moonshot provider API key

additional_protocols.key_setup_hint: Moonshot has historically offered an Anthropic-compatible endpoint for Claude Code. Add an anthropic provider named moonshot-anthropic with the same key; check the latest official docs for the baseURL (may be https://api.moonshot.cn/anthropic or similar).

zh.key_setup_hint: Moonshot 历史上为 Claude Code 提供过 Anthropic 兼容 endpoint。在 agent 里加一个 anthropic provider 命名 moonshot-anthropic, 同一个 key, baseURL 请去官网最新文档核对 (可能为 https://api.moonshot.cn/anthropic 或类似路径)。

providers.free_summary: qwen-turbo / qwen-plus get 1M tokens each; qwen-max gets 500k tokens
providers.key_setup_hint: DashScope-compatible API key (sk-...) for your agent's qwen provider
providers.notes: Alibaba Cloud ecosystem; the long validity window is the highlight

zh.free_summary: qwen-turbo / qwen-plus 各送 100万 tokens; qwen-max 送 50万 tokens
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 qwen provider DashScope-compatible API key (sk-...)
zh.notes: 阿里云生态;长有效期是亮点

providers.free_summary: Doubao doubao-pro / doubao-lite: 500k tokens on sign-up
providers.conditions: Volcengine account + real-name + enable the model service
providers.key_setup_hint: Configure a volcengine / doubao provider in your agent (custom base URL required)
providers.notes: ByteDance's in-house Doubao models; relatively low pricing

zh.free_summary: 豆包 doubao-pro / doubao-lite 注册赠 50万 tokens
zh.conditions: 火山引擎账号 + 实名 + 开通模型服务
zh.key_setup_hint: 在 agent 里配置 volcengine / doubao provider (需自定义 base URL)
zh.notes: 字节自研豆包,定价较低

providers.key_setup_hint: API key for your agent's baichuan provider

zh.free_summary: 新用户赠送 ¥20 (约 500k tokens Baichuan2-Turbo)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 baichuan provider API key

providers.free_summary: Permanent free tier — 14,400 req/day (Llama-3.3-70B / Mixtral / Qwen-2.5 and other open models)
providers.key_setup_hint: Put the gsk_ key into your agent's groq provider
providers.notes: Extremely fast inference (~500 tokens/sec); the free tier never expires but is rate-limited

zh.free_summary: 永久免费层 — 14400 req/day (Llama-3.3-70B / Mixtral / Qwen-2.5 等开源模型)
zh.conditions: 邮箱注册 (建议 Google/GitHub 第三方登录)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 groq provider 填入 gsk_ 开头的 key
zh.notes: 推理速度极快 (~500 tokens/sec),免费层永久不过期,但有 rate limit

providers.free_summary: Permanent free tier — 8,000 req/day (Llama-3.3-70B / Llama-3.1-8B / Qwen)
providers.key_setup_hint: API key for your agent's cerebras provider (csk_ prefix)
providers.notes: Even faster than Groq (~2000 tokens/sec); wafer-scale chips

zh.free_summary: 永久免费层 — 8000 req/day (Llama-3.3-70B / Llama-3.1-8B / Qwen)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 cerebras provider key (csk_ 开头)
zh.notes: 推理速度比 Groq 更快 (~2000 tokens/sec),晶圆级芯片

providers.key_setup_hint: Put the nvapi- key into your agent's nvidia provider
providers.notes: NVIDIA-hosted open-model lineup (Llama / Mistral / Phi / Yi / DeepSeek etc.)

zh.free_summary: 免费 1000 credits (约等于 1000 次大模型调用)
zh.conditions: NVIDIA 开发者账号 (注册免费)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 nvidia provider 填入 nvapi- 开头的 key
zh.notes: NVIDIA 托管的开源模型矩阵 (Llama / Mistral / Phi / Yi / DeepSeek 等)

providers.free_summary: Aggregator — ~20 ':free'-suffixed models (Gemini Flash / Llama / Qwen free variants)
providers.key_setup_hint: Put the sk-or-v1- key into your agent's openrouter provider; model names carry the :free suffix
providers.notes: One key for every vendor; free models are rate-limited (20 req/min shared)

zh.free_summary: 聚合平台 — 提供 ~20 个 ':free' 后缀模型 (Gemini Flash / Llama / Qwen 免费版)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 openrouter provider 填入 sk-or-v1- 开头的 key;model 名带 :free 后缀
zh.notes: 一个 key 用所有 vendor,免费 model 有 rate limit (20 req/min 共享)

additional_protocols.key_setup_hint: OpenRouter also supports an Anthropic-compatible endpoint (the /v1/messages path). Add a second anthropic provider named openrouter-anthropic, baseURL https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, same sk-or-v1- key — so Anthropic-protocol clients like Claude Code get free routing too.

zh.key_setup_hint: OpenRouter 同时支持 Anthropic 兼容 endpoint (/v1/messages 路径)。在 agent 里再加一个 anthropic provider 命名 openrouter-anthropic, baseURL https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, 同一个 sk-or-v1- key — Claude Code 等 Anthropic 协议客户端也可享有免费 routing。

providers.conditions: Google account + region (not accessible from mainland-China IPs)
providers.key_setup_hint: Put the AIza key into your agent's gemini provider
providers.notes: Very generous free tier, but mainland-China IPs are rejected; needs an overseas network

zh.free_summary: Gemini 2.0 Flash 免费 — 1500 req/day / 100万 tokens/min
zh.conditions: Google 账号 + 区域 (中国大陆 IP 不可访问)
zh.key_setup_hint: agent 的 gemini provider 填入 AIza 开头的 key
zh.notes: 免费层很慷慨,但中国 IP 直接拒绝;需海外网络

providers.free_summary: Free tier — Codestral 22B (code) / Mistral Small and others, rate-limited

providers.notes: Codestral is one of the current SOTA open code models

providers.notes: Aggregates open models — Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek / Mixtral etc.
